mapper.select: SELECT rc.id, rc.contract_no, rc.title, rc.house_id, rc.landlord_id, rc.tenant_user_id, rc.house_order_info_id, rc.start_date, rc.end_date, rc.monthly_rent, rc.deposit_method_id, rc.deposit_amount, rc.pay_cycle, rc.utility_payment_mode, rc.contract_content, rc.attachment_url, rc.status, rc.reject_reason, rc.cancel_reason, rc.termination_reason, rc.termination_apply_user_id, rc.termination_refund_amount, rc.termination_voucher_url, rc.termination_voucher_note, rc.termination_audit_note, rc.termination_refund_voucher_url, rc.termination_refund_voucher_note, rc.confirm_time, rc.termination_apply_time, rc.termination_audit_time, rc.termination_refund_time, rc.create_time, rc.update_time, h.name AS house_name, h.cover AS house_cover, lu.username AS landlord_name, tu.username AS tenant_name FROM rental_contract rc LEFT JOIN house h ON h.id = rc.house_id LEFT JOIN landlord l ON l.id = rc.landlord_id LEFT JOIN user lu ON lu.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN user tu ON tu.id = rc.tenant_user_id WHERE rc.id = #{id}
